//: ILLUSTRATIVE MOCKUP — the SMS plugin (docs 09 §6, 02 §12). Owns the `sms.*` Postgres schema; subscribes to `session.reminder_due` and `credit.issued`; gated at `pro` tier. Touches the system only through the five plugin seams.
name: @terminar/plugin-sms
description: Transactional SMS for Termínář, behind a swappable SmsProvider port (Twilio / SMSbrana). requiresTier: 'pro'.
